title: Pon Manickavel
desc: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the lives of high-profile persons are threatened.

title: Kalinga
desc: A nonchalant man defies all rules and crosses his village's boundary. As he tries to obtain the treasure hidden in the Kingdom of Kalinga, he encounters eerie occurrences.

title: Chakra
desc: A carefully planned mass robbery causes a police officer and a soldier to team up with each other and carry out an investigation, which reveals a vast syndicate of cybercriminals.

title: HIT: The Third Case
desc: The Homicide Intervention Team dispatches relentless officer Arjun Sarkar to track down a band of murderers and put an end to their gruesome killing spree.

title: Maari 2
desc: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

title: Kuruvi
desc: Vitrivel becomes caught in a web of crime and violence when he tracks down a man who holds his father as bonded labour along with many innocent people.

title: Doctor's Talk
desc: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Pon Manickavel
desc: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the lives of high-profile persons are threatened.

title: Shyam Singha Roy
desc: A director accused of plagiarism finds a transcendental connection to his past life when he digs deeper into his subconscious mind.

title: Shyam Singha Roy
desc: A director accused of plagiarism finds a transcendental connection to his past life when he digs deeper into his subconscious mind.

title: Yashoda
desc: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: PK
desc: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. However, he meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device with her help.

title: Saamy
desc: Aarusaamy, a police officer, accepts bribes from Perumal, a gangster, in order to maintain peace in his district. However, circumstances force him to go against Perumal.

title: Poojai
desc: A temple priest gives evidence in court about a murder that he has witnessed. Unfortunately for him, he bears witness against an influential landlord.

title: Gajaana
desc: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.
